rows.label: qev055401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Are you by any chance
Kun'eibu's collaborator?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0002
rows.name:
...You see, before he set off,
he left me with these words.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0003
rows.name:
If something were to happen to him, and
he couldn't obtain the Senirapa Water,
he wanted me to rely on you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_JNK0010
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev055401_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask if Kun'eibu hasn't
returned yet.

rows.label: qev055401_JNK0020
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev055401_SEL0021
rows.name:
Beat your chest and tell him to
rely on you for anything.

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0004
rows.name:
Yes... The Nightglow Forest is a terrifying place
teeming with native creatures...
Perhaps something has happened to him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0005
rows.name:
I have a favor to ask. I want you to head to
the Nightglow Forest and search for Kun'eibu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0006
rows.name:
You seem exactly like the person he described.
Truly straightforward and dependable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0007
rows.name:
Well then, I have one favor to ask.
I want you to head to the Nightglow Forest
and search for Kun'eibu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0008
rows.name:
And that we have finally managed to use
the high-purity water from the Biahno Water Purification Plant[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0009
rows.name:
to develop a technology capable of multiplying Senirapa Water.
Please pass that on to him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0010
rows.name:
With this technology, as long as we have even a small amount of Senirapa Water,
we Orphe can multiply here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0011
rows.name:
This should lighten the burden of his search
for Senirapa Water at least a little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0012
rows.name:
Together with the Senirapa Water he brings back,
we Orphe will proceed to the next stage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Please, you must find Kun'eibu.
I am counting on you, alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0014
rows.name:
The Senirapa Water multiplication method I developed
is still nothing more than an established theory.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0015
rows.name:
I believe it has a 99.95% chance of succeeding
as long as we have Senirapa Water, but
I need to conduct empirical testing soon...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0016
rows.name:
Please.
Find Kun'eibu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0017
rows.name:
They informed me of the circumstances.
Please, let me have the Senirapa Water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0018
rows.name:
No matter how small the amount, if we have it,
I will take responsibility for multiplying it
and ensuring the Orphe prosper in this land.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0019
rows.name:
Kun'eibu's dearest wish...
and this task that the survival of our race depends on.
You must absolutely accomplish it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Sin'eibu and Sen'eibu...
When I speak with them, I can strongly feel
Kun'eibu's Ovah flowing within them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0021
rows.name:
His death is a great loss for the Orphe, but
I am truly glad he was able to divide in the end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0022
rows.name:
We must obtain the Senirapa Water quickly
to increase the number of those blessed with happiness like his.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0023
rows.name:
Well...? Has there been any progress on your end
regarding the search for Senirapa Water?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0024
rows.name:
This is undoubtedly Senirapa Water!
With this much, it is possible to mass-produce enough
Senirapa Water to distribute to all the Orphe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0025
rows.name:
This city will likely overflow with Orphe as well.
Do you think the Earthlings will welcome that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev055401_SEL0031
rows.name:
Smile and say that you're sure
they will welcome it.

rows.label: qev055401_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev055401_SEL0041
rows.name:
Give a wry smile and say that
some might find it creepy.

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0026
rows.name:
Earthlings truly are a tolerant people.
Then without hesitation, I will multiply many Orphe
in this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0027
rows.name:
I see... The plants that serve as our nutrients
are also limited, so I will ensure we only multiply
to a degree that won't frighten the Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0028
rows.name:
Thank you very much.
With this, we can proceed to the next stage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0029
rows.name:
All the brothers who will be born from now on
will surely never forget their gratitude to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0030
rows.name:
You've returned safely.
Well... were you able to find Kun'eibu?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0031
rows.name:
What... Killed by native creatures...?
And he entrusted you with a single drop of Senirapa Water...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0032
rows.name:
I see... Even though we obtained the Senirapa Water,
that is a tremendous loss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0033
rows.name:
We must multiply as many Orphe as possible
to make up for his share, and quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0034
rows.name:
Please, hand over that Senirapa Water.
I will begin mass production immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0035
rows.name:
This is indeed Senirapa Water.
It's a wonder Kun'eibu managed to find it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0036
rows.name:
Just as he wished, this city will likely
overflow with Orphe as well.
Do you think the Earthlings will welcome that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_JNK0050
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev055401_SEL0051
rows.name:
Smile and say that you're sure
they will welcome it.

rows.label: qev055401_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev055401_SEL0061
rows.name:
Give a wry smile and say that
some might find it creepy.

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0037
rows.name:
Earthlings truly are a tolerant people.
Then without hesitation, I will multiply many Orphe
in this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0038
rows.name:
I see... The plants that serve as our nutrients
are also limited, so I will ensure we only multiply
to a degree that won't frighten the Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0039
rows.name:
Thank you very much.
With this, we can proceed to the next stage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055401_MSG0040
rows.name:
All the brothers who will be born from now on
will surely never forget their gratitude to you.[ST:wait ]
